title: NRBR (Not Real But Realistic)
description: NRBR is a realistic Minecraft resource pack, which stands for "Not Real But Realistic". The current version (V4) features over 300 blocks and is available in 32x, 64x, and 128x resolutions, with a 256x version available on my Patreon.
body:
NRBR is a Realistic Minecraft Resource Pack, it stands for "Not Real But Realistic". We currently have more than 300 blocks on the latest version of V4. It is available at 32x, 64x, and 128x for the free version. The 256x os available for $1 in my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/RoyaleAyam)
